prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软 科主榜约第70名（2026年），近年排名稳定在64-70区间，属中上层次综合类大学；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报抄袭事件，学 校已成立工作专班调查，对报考心理有一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第81位（一般），短视频曝光量中等偏低；地质学A、考古学A、软件工程A-，3个A-及以上 学科；与物理类招生专业关联：地质类（地质工程、资源勘查工程）对应地质学A，化工与制药类对应化学工程与技术（未单独评级），电子信息类对应信息与通信工程（未单独 评级）。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024年高热推荐，化工与制药类属生化环材大类（明显劝退），生物工程、地质类等传统工科热度平稳；本省2026年总考生约1 10868人，物理类估算约79271人，较2025年80421人略降约1.4%，竞争压力略有缓解；省控线2025年物理类本科批340分，2024年345分，近年基本稳定；西北大 学位于陕西西安，属跨省招生；该校在吉林省招生占比约1.5%-2.7%（2025年约1.5%），非主要生源省份，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年 计划小幅扩招3.4%加剧竞争、声誉偏负面降低报考热度，以及本省物理类考生略降1.4%缓解竞争，多因素对冲下预计位次在2025年基准13722名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位 次约14056名，区间13556-14556名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（通信工程、电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、微电子科学与工程、智能科学与技术）
- 化学（基地班）
- 金融学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 应急管理

- 化工与制药类（化学工程与工艺、制药工程、能源化学工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14056名，区间13556-14556名。位次在区间下限附近（13556以内）可重点冲击一档电子信息类、化学基地班等热门专业；位次在区间中段（14000左右）建议以二档 为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限附近（14500以外）建议以三档保底为主，软件工程（A-学科）性价比高可重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16641 → 11131 → 11052 → 12216 → 13722, showing an overall backward trend in recent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2670 places in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 13722; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 27-28 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 29 students in 2024-2025; the 2026 plan is 30 students, a slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 70th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 64-70 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Liberal Arts, with the school having established a special task force to investigate, which has a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 81st (average), with medium-low short video exposure; disciplines rated A: Geology, Archaeology, Software Engineering (A-), with 3 disciplines rated A- or above; related to Physics Category enrollment majors: Geological Class (Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering) corresponds to Geology A, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class corresponds to Chemical Engineering and Technology (not separately rated), Electronic Information Class corresponds to Information and Communication Engineering (not separately rated).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024; Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class belongs to the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials category (clearly discouraged); traditional engineering majors like Bioengineering and Geological Class have stable popularity; the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 110,868, with Physics Category estimated at about 79,271, a slight decrease of about 1.4% from 80,421 in 2025, easing competition slightly; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 340 points in 2025 and 345 points in 2024, remaining stable in recent years; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and is a cross-provincial enrollment institution; the university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1.5%-2.7% (about 1.5% in 2025), not a major source province, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking backward trend, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan by 3.4% intensifying competition, the negative reputation reducing application enthusiasm, and the slight decrease of 1.4% in provincial Physics Category examinees easing competition, multiple factors offset each other, and the ranking is expected to continue a slight backward shift from the 2025 baseline of 13722; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14056, with a range of 13556-14556.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information Class (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Chemistry (Base Class)
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Geographical Science Class (Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science)
- Emergency Management
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Energy Chemical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Bioengineering
- Geological Class (Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Earth Information Science and Technology
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 14056, with a range of 13556-14556. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (within 13556), focus on Tier 1 popular majors like Electronic Information Class and Chemistry Base Class; if your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 14000), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (beyond 14500), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, with Software Engineering (A- discipline) offering high cost-performance and worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1574 → 1489 → 2159 → 1802 → 1717, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2023, there was a notable backward shift due to changes in the provincial control line, but it has gradually stabilized in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 1717th place. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 13 students in 2021-2022, 12 in 2023, 11 in 2024-2025, and 10 in 2026, a reduction of about 9.1% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 70th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of comprehensive universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving the investigation into the plagiarism incident of Jia Qianqian, which has a certain impact on the overall image of the university. Douyin popularity ranking is 81st (average), with low attention. Disciplines: Archaeology A, Geology A, Software Engineering A-. Related to History Category enrollment majors: Cultural Heritage and Museology corresponds to Archaeology A (advantageous discipline), Chinese Language and Literature corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature (not separately rated), World History corresponds to World History (not separately rated).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese/Chinese Language) was evaluated as recommended in 2024, Journalism and Communication was clearly discouraged in 2023-2024 (Zhang Xuefeng effect continues), and Foreign Language and Literature is generally wait-and-see. The estimated number of History Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 31,597, a slight increase of about 1.7% from 31,071 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 384 points, up from 369 in 2024, showing an upward trend. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province for History Category is about 0.5%-0.8%, not a major source province, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuations in historical rankings, the 9.1% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan intensifying competition, a slight 1.7% increase in History Category examinees, and the somewhat negative reputation reducing application enthusiasm, it is expected that the ranking will move slightly forward (smaller ranking number, more intense competition) based on the 2025 baseline of 1717th place. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1653rd place, with a range of 1355-1951.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Cultural Heritage and Museology
- World History
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- English (Regional and Country Experimental Class)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Network and New Media).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- None at present.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1653rd, range 1355-1951. There are only 5 majors in History Category enrollment, with small ranking differences. Those near the lower limit of the range (within 1355) can aim for Tier 1 Cultural Heritage and Museology (Archaeology A discipline); those in the middle of the range (around 1650) are advised to focus on Chinese Language and Literature; those near the upper limit of the range (outside 1950) may find Journalism and Communication relatively easier to enter, but note that this major has significant social discouragement.
